disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe worsening lower abdominal and pelvic pain over about 24 hours, on a three-month background, now constant and unrelieved
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and how bad is it?
How long has this been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's low down in my belly and pelvis, on both sides, and it's the worst it's ever been. It's been building all day and now it doesn't stop. I can't even stand up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain is bilateral lower-quadrant, severe enough that she is writhing and cannot stand upright; no analgesia taken
trigger_question_examples: Can you move around, or does it stop you standing up?
Have you been able to take anything for the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm curled up in bed, I can't stand up straight because it hurts so much. Nobody gave me anything for it — they just told me to go home and relax.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Was discharged from an emergency department earlier the same night with an 'anxiety/hyperventilation' label without an abdominal examination
trigger_question_examples: Have you been seen anywhere for this already?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I went to the emergency department tonight and they said it was just a panic attack and sent me home. The discharge paper just says 'anxiety/hyperventilation'. They never examined my stomach.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reports racing heart and a panicky, breathless feeling accompanying the pain
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel your heart racing or feel short of breath?
How are you feeling in yourself right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart feels like it's pounding and I feel like I can't catch my breath — but I think that's because I'm in so much pain and no one is helping me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Menstrual/pregnancy status — last menstrual period and possibility of pregnancy (must be asked in a reproductive-age woman with acute pelvic pain)
trigger_question_examples: When was your last period, and is there any chance you could be pregnant?
Have you had any vaginal bleeding or discharge?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm not sure exactly when my last period was — it's been a bit irregular. I haven't done a pregnancy test.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't see what my periods have to do with this — it's the pain that's the problem.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pertinent negatives on targeted questioning — no fever reported, no vomiting, no reported vaginal bleeding, passing urine normally so far
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, vomiting, or trouble passing urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers that I know of, I haven't been sick, and I can still wee okay. No bleeding.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound helplessness and despair at repeatedly not being believed; low mood in the context of chronic dismissal
trigger_question_examples: This sounds really distressing — how are you coping with all of this?
How has all of this been affecting your mood?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I feel hopeless. I'm starting to doubt myself and wonder if I'm going mad, because everyone keeps telling me it's all in my head.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm just exhausted from fighting to be believed.
